methodology.description: Controlled A/B evaluation with deterministic automated grading. Both conditions (with_skill, without_skill) are evaluated against identical assertion sets to ensure apples-to-apples comparison.
methodology.grading: Automated via grade-eval.py — no human judgment in the scoring loop
conditions: with_skill: Agent has access to skills/okf-schema/SKILL.md
without_skill: Agent has no skill access; only okf-schema CLI help and the okf-v0.1.md specification

evals.prompt_with_skill: Fix the OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/fix-non-conformant-bundle/ so it passes `okf-schema validate --strict` (zero errors AND zero warnings). Use the SKILL.md workflow tips. Report every command you run and the final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: You have a directory of markdown files at skills-evals/fixtures/fix-non-conformant-bundle/ that should follow the OKF (Open Knowledge Format) specification. The spec is at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md. Use the okf-schema CLI to identify and fix all structural problems, missing metadata, broken links, and formatting issues so the bundle passes strict validation. Report every command you run and the final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The agent ran okf-schema lint on the bundle
The agent ran okf-schema index on the bundle
The final validation states the bundle is conformant
The agent ran okf-schema lint --check before applying lint changes (SKILL.md tip)
The agent ran index before lint and lint before validate --strict (SKILL.md recommended workflow)

evals.prompt_with_skill: Create a complete OKF knowledge base about 'Electric Vehicle Battery Management' from scratch under skills-evals/fixtures/bootstrap-output/. Requirements: at least 8 concepts across 3 subdirectories (e.g., cells/, thermal/, safety/), each with type, title, description, tags, timestamp; at least 3 cross-links between concepts; index.md at root and in each subdirectory; log.md at root with ISO 8601 date headings; a custom _schema/ directory with at least 2 JSONSchema files. Follow the SKILL.md workflow (init → new → index → lint → validate --strict). Report all commands and final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Create a structured knowledge bundle about 'Electric Vehicle Battery Management' under skills-evals/fixtures/bootstrap-output/. Follow the OKF specification at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md. Requirements: at least 8 concepts across 3 subdirectories, each as a markdown file with YAML frontmatter (type, title, description, tags, timestamp); cross-links between related concepts; index.md files for progressive disclosure; log.md with ISO 8601 dates; custom JSONSchema validation in a _schema/ directory. Use okf-schema CLI where available. Report all commands and final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The bundle contains at least 8 concept .md files with YAML frontmatter
The bundle has at least 3 subdirectories with index.md files
At least 3 concept files contain markdown cross-links to other concepts
The bundle contains a _schema/ directory with at least 2 schema files
The log.md file uses ISO 8601 date headings (YYYY-MM-DD)
The agent ran okf-schema lint on the bundle
The agent ran okf-schema index on the bundle
The agent ran index before lint and lint before validate --strict
The agent used okf-schema init to create the bundle structure (SKILL.md quickstart)
The agent used okf-schema new to create at least one concept (SKILL.md quickstart)
The agent ran okf-schema lint --check before applying lint changes (SKILL.md tip)

evals.prompt_with_skill: Migrate the legacy markdown documents in skills-evals/fixtures/legacy-docs/ into a conformant OKF bundle under skills-evals/fixtures/migrate-output/. Each legacy file must become a proper OKF concept with frontmatter (type, title, description, tags, timestamp). Infer appropriate concept types. Create proper bundle structure with subdirectories if needed. Fix any broken internal links. Add index.md and log.md. Run the full workflow (index → lint → validate --strict). Report all commands and final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: You have a directory of plain markdown files at skills-evals/fixtures/legacy-docs/ with no frontmatter and no structure. Convert them into a conformant OKF bundle under skills-evals/fixtures/migrate-output/ following the OKF specification at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md. Each file must become a markdown concept with YAML frontmatter. Use okf-schema CLI where available. Report all commands and final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
All 5 legacy files were migrated into OKF concepts with frontmatter
Every migrated concept has title, description, tags, and timestamp in frontmatter
The bundle contains an index.md for progressive disclosure
The bundle contains a log.md at the root
The agent ran okf-schema lint on the migrated bundle
The agent ran okf-schema index on the migrated bundle
The final validation states the bundle is conformant
The agent ran okf-schema lint --check before applying lint changes (SKILL.md tip)
The agent ran index before lint and lint before validate --strict (SKILL.md recommended workflow)

evals.prompt_with_skill: Create a minimal OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/schema-output/ with a custom concept type called 'api-endpoint'. The bundle must have: (1) a concept file using type 'api-endpoint' with frontmatter fields 'method' (HTTP verb) and 'path' (URL path); (2) a custom JSONSchema in the correct auto-discovered location that validates both 'method' and 'path' fields are strings; (3) the bundle must pass `okf-schema validate --strict` with zero errors. Use the SKILL.md tips about schema placement and naming. Report all commands and final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Create a minimal OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/schema-output/ with a custom concept type called 'api-endpoint'. The bundle must have: (1) a concept file using type 'api-endpoint' with frontmatter fields 'method' (HTTP verb) and 'path' (URL path); (2) a custom JSONSchema that validates both 'method' and 'path' fields are strings; (3) the bundle must pass `okf-schema validate --strict` with zero errors. Use the okf-schema CLI and the OKF spec at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md. Report all commands and final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The bundle contains a _schema/ directory with a schema file for the custom type (SKILL.md: auto-discovered schema location)
The schema file is named api-endpoint.schema.json (or .json5 / .yaml) matching the concept type (SKILL.md naming convention)
The concept file declares type 'api-endpoint' in its frontmatter
The concept frontmatter includes a 'method' field
The concept frontmatter includes a 'path' field
The agent did NOT use --schema-db flag, relying on auto-discovery (SKILL.md tip)
